metro_sports: Summer Concert Season Begins Across Metro
local_updates: Women's College World Series remains the primary metro demand driver.
Thunder season has concluded following Game 7 of the Western Conference Finals.
Hotel occupancy and restaurant traffic remain elevated due to WCWS visitors.
The Alley and Friends of Friends both feature verified live music lineups Friday and Saturday.
Riverwind, Bricktown, Midtown and NW OKC continue drawing weekend nightlife traffic.
Typical early June storm chances may affect outdoor activities.
weather_watch: Early June storm chances remain possible throughout the week. Outdoor events may experience delays or crowd shifts.
